name: @axona/protocol
description: Pure-JS protocol kernel for the Axona peer-to-peer mesh. Contracts (DHT, Transport, BootstrapService), the per-node AxonaPeer implementation (NH-1 routing + axonal pub/sub), and supporting helpers. No simulator dependencies; runs in browsers and Node.

scripts.test: node test/smoke_addressing.js && node test/smoke_errors.js && node test/smoke_persistence_inmemory.js && node test/smoke_persistence_file.js && node test/smoke_persistence_indexeddb.js && node test/smoke_identity.js && node test/smoke_post_ed25519.js
